source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English product UI with Japanese typography guidance for asparagus harvest lots, grade counts, cold-room inventory, pick lists, command search, and lot status messaging.
layout: Lean operational inventory dashboards, harvest planning flows, 8px radii, spear-green navigation, violet-tip focus states, field-mist surfaces, vertical ridge borders, and restrained row-soil depth.

prompts.label: Transparent Asparagus motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only one fresh asparagus spear for a Morphous design-system motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a single slender spring asparagus spear, full length visible from cut base to closed spear tip, tapered vertical form with fine triangular bracts and natural ridges. The spear is deep garden green with pale green highlights, a purple-violet blushed tip, small muted earthy soil-brown tint on the cut base, crisp opaque edges, botanical accuracy, no leaves or extra stalks.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, refined realistic painted-photographic finish, clean studio lighting that preserves natural green, violet, and soil tones.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; mostly vertical with a very slight natural curve; do not crop the subject; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: precise slender inventory system, spring field freshness, quiet operational clarity; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: asparagus greens, pale spring highlight, muted purple tip, soil-brown base only; do not use cyan or #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no bundle, no plate, no knife, no field, no second spear, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input image role: The visible transparent cutout is a single asparagus spear. Use that exact asparagus spear as the only motif reference.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Asparagus".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Hard subject lock: This is ASPARAGUS. Show a slender asparagus spear preview, spear-ridge texture, triangular bracts, violet asparagus tip, cut-base ivory, and soil-brown base marks. Do not show Romanesco, broccoli, cauliflower, spirals, fractals, cones, cabbages, succulents, moss, or any other vegetable.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: slender inventory system for spring field harvest planning, asparagus grading, bunch counts, cold-room stock, pick lists, lot tracking, and market readiness; lean, precise, fresh, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the asparagus spear motif: deep spear green, mid stalk green, pale spring highlight, unopened-tip violet, bract mauve, cut-base ivory, root-soil brown, soft field mist off-white, and dark row-soil ink. Do not introduce unrelated blue, coral, orange, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: premium product design board with a left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and a bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for harvest and inventory screens. Include readable examples: "アスパラ", "収穫ロット", "在庫", "等級", "春畑".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, pick-list card, grade distribution chart, cold-room inventory table, lot status card, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle vertical spear-ridge dividers, triangular asparagus bract chips, fine stalk-line texture, misty spring field paper surfaces, violet tip focus ring, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, field mist shadow, spear ridge border, violet-tip focus ring.
Constraints: title must say Morphous Asparagus, not any other motif; every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no purple or blue gradients; avoid one-note green by using the motif's violet tips, ivory base, and soil browns as secondary roles.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible Morphous Asparagus light design-system board and the visible asparagus spear motif as source references.
Primary request: Generate a DARK MODE translation of the same shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system, titled exactly "Morphous Asparagus". It must feel like the same slender inventory system in dark mode, not a new motif.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Hard subject lock: This is ASPARAGUS. Show a slender asparagus spear preview, spear-ridge texture, triangular bracts, violet asparagus tip, cut-base ivory, and soil-brown base marks. Do not show Romanesco, broccoli, cauliflower, spirals, fractals, cones, cabbages, succulents, moss, or any other vegetable.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: night-mode slender inventory system for spring field harvest planning, asparagus grading, bunch counts, cold-room stock, pick lists, lot tracking, and market readiness; lean, precise, fresh, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the asparagus spear motif: dark row-soil ink and deep spear green backgrounds, mid stalk green controls, pale spring highlight text, unopened-tip violet focus, bract mauve chips, cut-base ivory highlights, root-soil brown warnings, and misted field borders. No unrelated blue, coral, orange, neon, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: preserve the same section coverage and product-board logic as the light board: left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for harvest and inventory screens. Include readable examples: "アスパラ", "収穫ロット", "在庫", "等級", "春畑".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, pick-list card, grade distribution chart, cold-room inventory table, lot status card, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle dark vertical spear-ridge dividers, triangular asparagus bract chips, fine stalk-line texture, soil-shadow panels, violet tip focus ring, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained dark shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, row-soil shadow, spear ridge border, violet-tip focus ring.
Constraints: title must say Morphous Asparagus, not any other motif; every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no pure black flat background; no purple or blue gradients; avoid one-note green by using the motif's violet tips, ivory base, and soil browns as secondary roles.
